name: INPINITY Resource — Lemons
description: Lemons are a base resource in INPINITY Online. Farmed by Pyramid Blocks, claimable, tradable, and used for Infinite City building and progression.

farmingV1.claim: Claimed via claimResources. Until claimed, resources are stored on the block.

risk.pirates: Stored resources can be stolen by pirate attacks (up to 9% per day) until claimed.
